summary:
MINISTRY EVALUATION AND INTIMACY WITH GOD: Brandon discusses his annual self-evaluation of his spiritual intimacy. Brandon recounts a conversation with a mega-minister regarding the downfall of major prophetic voices, attributing their failure to a loss of intimacy with God despite maintaining their spiritual gifts. Brandon emphasizes that while gifts are given without repentance, ministries will slowly fade without continuous intimacy. Brandon notes the dangers of relying solely on the manifestation of gifts, referencing historical figures like Jack Coe and unnamed ministers who fell into sin yet continued preaching. Brandon stresses the importance of pruning distractions to prioritize God.

OBEDIENCE AND SPIRITUAL REWARDS: Brandon reflects on the necessity of obedience, even when it contradicts fleshly desires, citing examples like cleaning toilets, living in modest housing, and cheerful giving. Brandon shares a vision of a narrow white path where God audibly told him he is being watched to see if his choices qualify him for the next level. Brandon reveals he has declined multiple invitations to the White House, including meetings with Jentezen Franklin and Paula White, choosing instead to follow the principle of going low and slow. Brandon emphasizes that true spiritual success is not measured by wealth but by the harvest of souls, aiming to see one hundred million people saved.

GLOBAL EVENTS AND PROPHECIES FOR THE COMING YEARS: Brandon outlines several prophecies for 2026 through 2028, starting with the fulfillment of a vision regarding a non-stereotypical terror plot in California involving women. Brandon warns of impending persecution against freedom of speech, specifically mentioning Article C9 in Canada, as well as an olive press of restrictions affecting Australia, England, France, and Europe. Brandon describes upcoming natural disasters, including an 8.4 magnitude earthquake on the New Madrid fault line, earthquakes shaking temples in Thailand, Nepal, and India, and the splitting of Italy and Japan. Brandon foresees weather modification warfare causing severe floods in Asia.

TECHNOLOGY DIGITAL CURRENCY AND SOCIETAL SHIFTS: Brandon predicts the aggressive implementation of digital IDs and the phasing out of physical cash due to a virus. Brandon notes that this digital infrastructure will gradually lay the groundwork for the mark of the beast system. Brandon references an interview with Kash Patel about the vulnerabilities of the outdated electrical grid, aligning with his own vision of three-week power outages in major cities. Brandon claims that impending UFO disclosures will actually feature demonic entities, such as Nephilim and reptilian lineages from ancient societies, rather than extraterrestrial aliens.

THE COMING PLAGUE AND TERRORIST THREATS: Brandon warns of a highly lethal plague engineered in a laboratory using artificial intelligence and elements of COVID-19 and the bubonic plague, expected to hit in the fall of 2027. Brandon states the disease will be resistant to prescription medications, spread via rats, and cause rapid death. Brandon also shares a vision of a terrorist plot to poison municipal water supplies, resulting in twenty-three million deaths and massive communal graves. Brandon advises that believers can protect themselves by understanding their spiritual authority and meditating on Psalms 91 and 23.

TESTIMONIES OF SPIRITUAL EMPOWERMENT: Brandon shares his personal history, recalling his first vision at age sixteen while interceding against a Satanist. Brandon describes learning to pray through Lyn Hammond teachings and receiving powerful impartations from Reinhard Bonnke and Ralph Wilkerson, the latter passing on a mantle associated with Kathryn Kuhlman. Brandon recounts experiencing the tangible fire of God during these encounters, which subsequently led to creative miracles in his ministry, including physical healings and raising animals from the dead.

VISIONS OF THE CARIBBEAN LATIN AMERICA AND IRELAND: Brandon details visions received during the prayer session, describing volcanic eruptions and lava flows on a Caribbean island near Cuba, alongside scenes of plague and burning cadavers. Brandon observes a vibrant green snake with yellow eyes near Guatemala, signifying a contaminated water supply affecting tribal communities. Brandon calls for missionaries like David Hogan and Heidi Baker to reach these remote areas. Brandon also prophesies a major youth-led revival in Ireland, beginning with a specific young man and woman, which will face intense opposition from traditional religious elders but will ultimately transform the region.

THE TRIBULATION AND THE THOUSAND YEAR REIGN: Brandon clarifies eschatological timelines, stating that the rapture will take all children under the age of fifteen, leaving behind unrepentant adults. Brandon warns that the seven-year tribulation will be worse than anyone anticipates, acting as a literal hell on earth. Brandon advises followers to perform acts of service in secret to earn rewards during the upcoming thousand-year reign of Christ, avoiding the desire for public recognition. Brandon mentions environmental anomalies leading up to these events, such as altered animal breeding cycles and a persistent haze over the earth.
rawData: [December 17, 2025]-[Come pray with me today]-[https://youtu.be/LmS3IDri3Ok]-[Wow, that was fast. Well, good evening everybody. Thank you for joining us tonight. I don't know where Braden wants to go from here. I've got my microphone, but I had a really interesting conversation yesterday on the phone. Every year, I evaluate where we are, what the Lord has done, and what we could do better. Especially now that we're in ministry, I evaluate the intimacy level—checking your thermostat, as I call it. Where is your thermostat with God? How are things? If you were to get your report card or your evaluation at work for how you did for the year—your review for the year—and the boss comes in and says, 'Well, you could have done this better, or you did this really well, and your progress report was pretty good, so we'll give you a raise or keep you where you are.' I go over things with the Father like that all the time at the end of the year. I always evaluate and write things down because I don't want to be where I am at this time next year. I look and see if I made any progress spiritually. After I had a really interesting conversation with a mega-minister yesterday—he called and wanted to talk to me—I asked some questions that I normally don't ask, but the Lord told me to ask him because he would have the answers. I asked about a lot of mega-prophets and how come they didn't sustain in ministry or why they went home early. I asked what happened to some of these prophetic voices that have gone before us. He went over the details of why some of these major voices that used to be—that are no more—fell, and why their ministries faltered. He knew a lot of the answers. As we were talking, it really bothered me. One person was messed up with homosexuality. One was messing around with golden idols. There were so many different things. As I heard it all, I paused. They all started out really good with great intentions and great intimacy with the Father. You don't get there without intimacy. But what went wrong? I'm not going to reveal these men's names, but as I was thinking about people I had looked up to and admired, you see the slow fade after year after year of ministry. I didn't get the answer right off. I was praying all last night and seeking the Lord because of the things He's showing me. As you're checking your thermostat of where you are with the Father, you have to ask, 'How is my relationship with God?' I don't ever want to be arrogant and say, 'That will never happen to me,' because these people, in my opinion, were the best over the years. How do you stay on the right road? How do you self-evaluate? I woke up this morning and the Lord spoke to me in my sleep. He said, 'Intimacy is what gets you there with Me, and intimacy is what will keep you there.' So many times, these ministers start with healings, demonstrations, and manifestations, but they lose the intimacy with the Father. The gift is separate from intimacy. Intimacy is how you got the gift, but it's not how you sustain it. Over time, you get so caught up—because it's trying to happen to me—with the pulling on the gift that you believe walking underneath that mantle is intimacy for the day. You're so busy with all the people pulling on you that you don't separate yourself to have the intimacy that got the gift in the first place. It becomes robotic. The Lord said, 'Brandon, it's a slow fade. Many of the ministers you were told about yesterday started out just like you—on fire and effective. But the gift and callings of God are without repentance.' You can operate in a gift while there is stuff going on in your personal life because the gift is without repentance. You qualify for it, but if you cut yourself off the vine, you don't die instantaneously. Intimacy keeps you on the vine. You cannot let intimacy with the Father die, or eventually, your ministry will be short-lived. You cannot rely just on the experience of healings and demonstrations. I always tell you that covering comes on me and I can feel it when I'm praying, but the Lord was warning me: just because you have that impartation at that time doesn't mean you're walking in intimacy with Me. You have to check your spiritual thermostat. They are two different things. He's been talking to me about evaluating your progress report. I'm real open about things, and I learn as I go. Some of the elders who went before us, like Jack Coe, were warned about their weight. He was in his 30s when he passed away. What a tragic thing for somebody who walked in so much creative miracles to only have a ministry last until their 30s. This is so taxing, with so much demand. If you keep going down the road—because some people were committing adultery or were homosexual—the Lord warned them, 'If you keep going down this road, you're going to hell.' The word of the Lord came up so strong about this stuff that it shook me. I even knew a man personally who was messing around on his wife for two years prior to getting caught. The only reason he got caught was a text message. People ask how he kept preaching. He said the word is truth regardless. So I'm just preaching the word. It's okay; I knew that if I could just keep preaching the word, it didn't matter about my personal life because the word always stands by itself. I believe that was it, wasn't it? And I was just thinking that is such a dangerous place to be. But just going over your year for 2025 and going into 2026 and looking at what God has for you so that you take what you did well into the year and strip off the bad things. And the Lord told me, 'Brandon, I've warned and warned my people.' It keeps stirring up inside of me, what the Lord told me to say about 2026 and 1 Corinthians 5:5. As I lay there this morning and listened to the Father, I said, 'God, help me. Search me, know me, create in me a clean heart. Strip all this stuff off. Whatever it takes, intimacy with Me is more important than anything else. Who cares if the platform pulls you away from the Father? If you're so distracted with the platform, then it's time to prune it. Does that make sense? He's first. Intimacy is everything to have a relationship—the fellowship that got you there in the first place—to sustain it. That's where dryness comes in. There's so much dryness. I see pastors teaching out of their dryness and there's no good word. I even talked to one man and he said, 'It's interesting. I can go into a service and they're still preaching on something that they were preaching 30 years ago. Thirty years later, they don't have any new wine or new wineskins, continually preaching the same thing.' You get to the point where you ask, 'Do you not have any fresh Rhema from God?' Now, I know Brother Hagin taught Mark 11:23-24, but there was an anointing on it when he preached it. You could feel the tangible presence of God when he taught that. So obviously, in those cases, it was meant for him to preach. Now, for some of these other people, it's like going into the Mojave Desert and wondering, 'Why am I even here?' It's interesting when you talk to people who have been through the trenches, like the person I talked to yesterday and another one of my mentors. It's been interesting, the people who have called. You get to meditate on these things and walk away thinking, 'I don't want to say I'll never do that.' I always want to self-evaluate and be humble about it. I'm not saying I'm better than them; heavens, no. For some of these people, I couldn't even tie their shoelaces. But if you don't self-evaluate your relationship and look at your thermostat with God, you'll drift off easily. Just because you have a call and there's a mantle or an impartation on that call doesn't mean that your intimacy level is good. You must self-evaluate all the time and say, 'Father, how are you and I? Not the ministry. How am I with you? How are things going? Am I doing okay? Am I pleasing to you?' After I sat and wept on the floor, He gave me a word. That word was intimacy. It was private for me, but I'm very thankful for where I am with my Father. Yes, there are things you can work on. Ultimately, if you cut yourself from the vine, you don't instantaneously dry up and die. It's a slow fade. You are dying instantaneously, but the branch always has life for a little bit. You can even cut it and see green underneath the bark. The leaves start to wither first, the fruit fades, and all of a sudden, what was once alive becomes dead because He's the true source. I realized as I listened that I don't want to be a statistic in ministry. So as I focus on what could be done better in 2026, I want the capacity to reach the lost to increase. The capacity for healing must increase—not just physical healing, but mental and emotional healing. There are so many people on our email list dealing with mental drama. I try to be a place of refreshing for all people to come and drink from, so that when they are here, they get a fresh touch from the Holy Ghost. The only way you can give—'Silver and gold have I none, but such as I have give I thee: In the name of Jesus Christ of Nazareth rise up and walk'—is through intimacy. They had been with Jesus. They were unlearned, uneducated men who had been with Jesus. That's what the Bible says. The world marveled because they had been with Jesus. It's not just being with Him once; it's being with Him continually, sitting at His feet. It's the intimacy with the Father that says, 'Jesus, I'm here. I need You to change me and take me from glory to glory.' In Diana's and my case, we practice what we preach when we say we walk in love—sowing even when you don't want to sow, giving and being where God tells you to be. It's interesting because we laugh about things. We always say Joyce Meyer talks about how in the kingdom of God, a lot of things are backwards. When people treat you badly, you don't go after them or be mean; you walk in love. When you sow, you give your money away to believe God for extra. Everything seems awkward, upside down, and inside out. We love Joyce Meyer, don't we? Everything goes against your flesh. When you think, 'Lord, are You going to release me from this church to move on because of this and that?' and the Lord says, 'No, I want you to stay,' and you keep working things out, it makes your flesh scream. If your flesh isn't screaming, you aren't growing spiritually. You need to know this. When He says to clean toilets for years, do it with a good heart—without grumbling and complaining. Live in a shotgun house for 20 years. Do what I've asked without grumbling and complaining. Do all that you do, in word and deed, to the glory of God, and He'll release you. Do it with a joyful heart. The willing and obedient will eat the good of the land, not the grudging. There are so many times the Lord tells Diana and me to do something against our flesh. He says, 'I want you to sow this.' I think, 'Are you kidding me?' But then I say, 'Okay, I'll do it.' But I can't do it with a grudging heart; I have to do it with joy. 'I love a cheerful giver, Brandon.' So I do it with a cheerful attitude and walk in love. This happens to me all the time. The Lord says, 'This is molding you. If you do what I tell you, you'll go to the next level. I'm watching your heart.' In a vision, I saw a path of white; it was beautiful but skinny, with no edges. As far as the eye could see, it was a dimension. I pulled out of it because it freaked me out. I had to meditate on it because the Lord was dealing with me. I saw the nose. I saw a cheek, and I saw the side of a mouth. His face was right on the edge of the path, but his eye was all I could see. I didn't say this, but he spoke to me in an audible voice in my house. That's why it freaked me out. I heard it. And he says, 'I'm watching you. I'm watching you.' And that's why I started singing His Eye Is on the Sparrow, for I know he watches me. That's why I sang that song because he said to me, 'I'm watching you, Brandon. I'm watching you and how you make these decisions and these choices. Do you qualify to go to the next level? Do you qualify to get more? I have more in store in 2026. I have more in store in the days ahead.' But do you qualify for it? What qualifies you? Obedience. Listening whenever your flesh screams. Will you qualify, ladies and gentlemen, for what God has for you by obedience? Obedience is better than sacrifice. And it's not always easy when he tells you... when people call and say, 'I got another call yesterday to go to the White House.' This is the fourth time. To go to the White House, fourth time. 'No, don't go. Not yet.' 'Well, you need to give me an answer.' I could have been there today at the White House. It could have been very interesting to meet Jentezen Franklin and Paula White again and another man. These people... I always butcher his name, that's why I don't try to say it. It's his Spanish name, a pastor from Miami. That's what I say. Sorry, I know he's probably watching; I don't mean to be rude. It's just I'm not real good with names sometimes, but all the opportunities that come across your path, you're so thankful for what God opens the door maybe, but at the same time, I want to make sure I don't do things without hearing him. So I say, I was taught by another prophetic voice: go low, go slow. Don't do anything quick. If it needs a quick answer, tell them no. Go low, go slow inside. And that's what we do. It's very... and I learned that's what keeps you on balance. Do you want to read what the Lord said? Because he said it a lot better when you get it on recording. 'Love, Diana.' 'Oh, I thought you said it perfect. You want me to still read it?' 'No. Did I say it perfect?' 'You said it beautiful.' Okay, love. I just want to make sure because I want to communicate it where people get this, because if you don't listen to what I'm telling you, I truly believe with all my heart that people won't make it in ministry, just like we've seen. And I keep trying to go and I want so bad for longevity, but not just longevity where you see mega-ministers with big houses, big cars, big planes, runways, whatever, with hundreds of millions in the bank, whatever TV program. Listen, folks, I'm just into him. The byproduct of following him is blessing. I get that. But where I'm at right now is I want that anointing so strong that whenever people see it, they see Jesus in me and they say, 'Brandon, what must I do to be saved? What must I do to be saved?' I am so broken that when my shadow passes by, the power of God radiates out of me so strong that they get healed by the Holy Ghost because the glory of the Lord is inside of me. Silver and gold have I none, but such as I have give I thee. I think about them all the time—the disciples—and they walked... they had been with Jesus. What does it take to stay with Jesus in these modern days with all these distractions, with all the social media and all these things, and you've got to get money and you've got to raise your kids and go to church? You've got all these things and all these voices, and I just keep the main thing the main thing. And it's like my friend Billy says—call him my mentor now, my spiritual father: 'Go vertical, Brandon. You must stay vertical and keep humble.' The longevity, even in your ministry, is to maintain humility in these last days. I always listen to him; maintain humility. There's so much arrogance and so much pride in people, and God resists the proud. He gives grace to the humble and in due time, he said he would exalt you. So, in humility... and I thought, is humility always just saying, 'It's not me, brother. I just want everybody to know it's all Jesus inside of me,' but inside you're just weak with arrogance? Because I see some people, they take pictures with their Gucci pants and they've got their stuff on there and they say, 'We just want to make the religious people squirm.' Arrogant, stinking... and you look at them with their big jet behind them. 'We just want to make the religious people squirm.' Arrogant? Are you kidding me? You're just full of pride, just oozing with pride, sir. And I already know what the Lord says about it. But I don't bust on people who have planes, but I do bust on arrogance. Regardless of whether you think you're not, it's arrogance. There are a lot of people who say, 'I'm not trying to brag,' but they're full of bragging. Full of bragging! That's all you're doing is just bragging about what you got. '$35 million.' You say you're not bragging? 'I'm not bragging, I'm just bragging on Jesus.' Okay, whatever. That's all you talk about: big houses, big cars. Because out of the abundance of the heart, the mouth speaks. 'As a man thinketh in his heart, so is he.' What is more important? What are you always talking about? Souls. I'm going to be real with you. You know what my flex is going to be? When you say, 'I got a hundred million people saved.' A hundred million people got born again. Now, that's a flex. All glory to Jesus, though. I don't care. You could take your money and put it... I'm telling you, when I get on the other side and I'm standing before Jesus, I want him to say, 'Brandon, you did good, boy. You got a hundred million people saved, son.' It won't be, 'Brandon, you know what? You got a billion dollars in the bank. Well done.' He's not going to say that. 'You believe me for that billion dollars and I saw that you had it in your bank account and I'm really impressed with that.' What does he care about the most? Souls. He died for every single one of you. When he looks at his hands and he shows them to me, and humongous holes were in them... humongous holes. He said, 'I suffered for you. I suffered for all of them. Would you help me bring in the harvest?' Brandon, that's my heart. My heart is the harvest, not how many zeros you have in your bank account. And there are so many pompous, arrogant preachers that I cannot stand to even watch because of how arrogant you are about your finances and all that you have and all that you bank up in your accounts. I hear about it and it's a stench before the body of Christ as you try to make excuses for everything you have. Billion-dollar homes, whatever... a million dollars. I don't care that you have it, but let's get the people saved. Jesus looks and he shows me his hands and he says, 'Look at my hands, Brandon. I died for every single one of them. Will you help me?' I know God's people will be blessed if you do right. When you give, it shall be given unto you: good measure, pressed down, shaken together, and running over. Will men give into your bosom. It's part of the spiritual law, but it's not where my focus is at. You've lost your focus. You've lost your first love. You fall in love with the world, you're an enemy of God. If you have fallen in love with the world, how can you say the things you say? "Well, you know, I'm trying to make people jealous, envious, stir up the religious spirits," people say. I said, "Okay, but man, don't you want to stir up the body of the world? How do we bring people to Jesus? How do we have the nets?" I saw the big shrimping boats. I saw them full. And he said, "Brandon, I'm going to give you a big shrimping boat when it comes to souls now instead of this little boat you've had with the pole. You bring them in, but then you'll increase and there'll be shrimping boats all over the place." And I saw it. He said, "Just be faithful with what I've given you." But I've tried to tell you all as you look at the hands of Jesus, he died for every single one of you. And the Lord told me, "A lot of these ministers, their hearts are good, Brandon, but they've lost their reverence." Being reverent, they've lost it. Learn from their mistakes. I know we're all works in progress, but I so desperately want when I get over there for him to say, "You did good. You got a hundred million souls saved or whatever." And you said, "Now that's worth applauding." I hope that ministers to you tonight. I am so tired of the way people act and the more I'm around it, it's a stench to my nose. And you say, "Well, who cares what you think, Brandon?" Well, I so happen to hear the heart of the Father. I can hear it. As you walk prophetically, you hear what's on his heart and his heartbeat, and all that is around us. There's a lot of stench to his nose. And they have swayed and deviated off course so much they still feel they're on that vine and they were severed years ago. They're preaching the same stinking message they've been having for the last 30 years plus, but they've severed themselves and they think they're okay, but there's no intimacy with them. It happens over and over. But First Corinthians 5:5 will be for a lot of ministers this year, a lot of the body of Christ, because he said, "Brandon, judgment begins in the house of the Lord first" as 170,000 people die a day. How many of them know my friend? How many of them know? But not so much that they know him, does he know them? How many of them in the intimacy of the day? Billions of people don't know Jesus Christ. And that's what's sad. You're not taking any of it with you. It's interesting. Did I say anything out of line? I'm pretty open, but I always say please watch what I say. If you don't agree with it—last night, the night before, I criticized Erica. And I want to tell you, I'm not criticizing the young lady. I'll tell you what I saw in a vision. And people got so upset about that. I got email after email. I said, "I'm not criticizing nobody. I'm trying to tell you what I saw." I saw this. "What did you see? You saw, Brandon, you said that there would be glory events." Yes. And I stand by it 110% of what the Lord showed me, that there'll be glory events, but it goes with what I just told you. God can use anybody, ladies and gentlemen, with the platform or whatever, but it doesn't mean they're intimate with him. They might have been at one time. And you say, "Well, don't judge." I ain't judging. I'm telling you what I saw in my vision of what the Lord gave me. It's not judging. If you don't want to hear it, don't listen. You can click off just like you clicked in. But I have to tell you what I saw and what I'm required to tell you what the Lord says. And so far now we'll go to what we've seen in the news. Do you have anything, Braden? Last night we talked about Australia. Everybody's talking about—no, it was the New Year's Eve. Many more people about the New Year's Eve. We see the New Year's Eve and what the Lord showed us about "Do not stereotype." Can you play that? Braden's going to play the clip of what I said on New Year's Eve about New Year's Eve and what's coming. I want you to see this video real quick. You have it? You can play it and it goes with what happened in California. Play it quick. "Not all terrorists are Arabs." That's what I just heard the Lord say. "You're looking only for Arabs, but it's an infiltration from somebody who is not. This is not an Arab, but it's somebody who is of Muslim faith. Just because they don't have dark skin, don't look for what's about to happen for stereotypes." Do you understand? Stereotypes is the biggest deception. You are looking only to dark skin. It's stupid. You must come up higher. The plan is darker. He's talking to the United States government. "Don't stereotype in this. Look to the others. There is a plan with people you do not expect. Look deeper in your own rats in your government." It's right in front of your face, but it's deep. They've infiltrated at all levels in your malls. A major plan bigger than you understand. They're trying to cover their tracks. It's on a mainframe of the computer that they're trying to do what Hillary did. Every step they take, they've been strategic. They're shredding the evidence. And it's like a whitewashing of the computers everywhere they go. But they're infiltrated in the least likely areas you expect. Everybody's always looking for the people with the hat on and that would have a big beard and walk in and have jihad. You know what I'm saying? But the Lord said, "Look deeper. It's right in front of your face. Even in the NSA, not all terrorists are Arab." So, we have some terrorists that don't look normal. Do you see them? Four people were caught in California that are supposedly plotting; they built the bombs out in the desert. Now they were trying to attack New Year's Eve in the Los Angeles area. Not only that, from what I'm understanding there's more people that are being uncovered. A major plot against the United States of America is being uncovered. And I believe this is a result of prayer. Now, as you see this, they don't look like terrorists to me. They look like some white girls that just have a bad attitude. Look at that. Like the one girl, she looked like somebody that's trying to be a Kardashian or something. I just thought it was interesting. No kidding, huh? Not stereotype, is it? Just like the Lord said. Don't have a stereotype. Pro-Palestinian. Is the one girl Asian? She looks Asian to me on this one. The only man looks kind of like he'd be one of them. But isn't that interesting? It's just like the Lord said. Now the number two thing that we've been talking about was Sydney and what happened. I saw Sydney, that harbor. And when the Lord told me it will be on this side, for a major event is coming towards Australia and he showed us these things coming. I still believe there's more. Now, these were people that were coming against the Jewish community because they were celebrating Hanukkah, and they shot I don't know how many people. Now, what did I tell you was coming next? To Australia, Canada, and Toronto. The Lord spoke to us that a major event was going to take place in Toronto and in these areas going across Canada, Australia, England, and France. As this happens, the Lord said they would bring in more social credit scores, digital ID, and suppression. Then people sent me, "Hey, Brandon, did you know that they're working on article C9 in Canada right now to make it where religious organizations cannot speak out against other things because it will be a hate crime?" article C9. Thank you, son. So we have the persecution coming just like the Lord told us in Canada. Now, I personally believe this would be passed because of what I saw coming next. For I saw an uprising in the church, and there was... now, I don't want to call them riots because I'm not inciting riots. I saw protests—protests is a better word—very strong local protests. That's what I will call it for YouTube censorship. It was very strong protesting going on against your government when they come against it. And I saw an olive press—the olives in Canada—against freedom of speech. Does everybody remember that word that the Lord gave us? He said, "Great persecution is coming to Canada against freedom of speech, and you will not be able to say what you want to say, even on social media, at a greater level in the days ahead." And I have that video, but I don't think Braden has that ready. But we've heard it over and over again about the olive press coming to England, Australia, Canada, France, Europe, Germany, Italy, and these other areas. And he said great persecution is coming to the church through an escalation through 2026, 2027, and 2028. So I have been praying into what the Lord meant when he said, "You must be a learned church." In this last video, he said specifically—because Diamond took the notes—he said, "You must learn a different way, church, to think outside of the box concerning how to catch the people, for the old way is not going to work anymore."
